productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kids Unisex YG 3S Core Ess Pink T-Shirt
description: Composition Baby pink round neck T-shirt with cap sleeves with cuff, seam lining tape on inner back neck, adidas 3-Stripes in white tape on shoulders and adidas logo embroidered on chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash below 40°C Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, do not tumble dry, do not bleach, do not dry clean Dry in shade War iron Just perfect for a girl who loves to play Sports, the baby pink colour keeps the tee girly while the famous Adidas stripes show she's serious about playing games. As expected from Adidas, the tee is made of soft comfortable cotton and has no tag on the back neck to give itch-free comfort to your little one.
